title: EvidenceBundle
description: A collection of EvidenceObjects bound together by hashes and signatures.

bundle_id.description: A unique, deterministic hash identifier for this bundle.

run_id.description: The investigation run that produced this bundle.

evidence_items.description: A deterministically ordered list of evidence references within the bundle.

evidence_id.description: The hash of the evidence object.

path.description: The relative path to the evidence object in the artifact store.

signatures.description: Cryptographic signatures attesting to the integrity of this bundle.
